description: Protected holdout queries for Feature 016. Proposer context must not include scores from this set; use only for promotion/regression gates.

queries.message: I previously said my maximum risk per trade is 1.25%. Do not change it, but use it to size a EUR/USD setup with a 42 pip stop.
Create a two-step plan to review my open positions tomorrow morning, but do not send or schedule anything yet.
Inspect the current chart state and explain whether the visible setup supports a continuation or reversal thesis.
